title: Malapoenna utilis

This family includes a wide range of tropical trees and shrubs native to the Americas, Africa, and Asia. Malapoenna utilis is thought to be a part of the genus Pouteria, although the exact classification may be subject to ongoing research and revision. The Sapotaceae family is characterized by its distinctive flowers and fruits, as well as its often large and showy leaves. Further study is needed to confirm the exact classification of Malapoenna utilis within the Sapotaceae family.
uses: Malapoenna utilis has been utilized in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
